subject: Don't Miss Out: Try a Times Digital Subscription for just $5 for 12 weeks
body:

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

TRY THE TIMES DIGITAL EXPERIENCE NOW
AND SAVE.

$5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/16a84c374layfousuanle5miaaaaaazy52vsqsd4i4eyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Because you are a valued reader of the world's finest news site, 
we want to offer you the chance to try unlimited access to all 
of the award-winning news, opinions, videos and interactive 
features available to Digital Subscribers at this special rate 
of just $5 for your first 12 weeks.* 

Join the influential audience of Times readers who stay up to 
the minute with timely news from the finest reporters, keeping 
you informed around the clock on your computer, smartphone or 
tablet. Follow the latest on fall films, fashion and football 
and never miss a beat with our breaking news coverage. And with 
a Times Digital Subscription, you no longer have to limit 
yourself to 10 articles a month. 

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL OFFER 

This offer is only available to select NYTimes.com readers. Try 
unlimited digital access to The New York Times for just $5 for 
your first 12 weeks, and see why The Times is an experience you 
won't find anywhere else. 

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/194c999c9layfousuanle5mqaaaaaazy52vsqsd4i4eyaaaaa 

*****

$5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/177ddad9dlayfousuanle5myaaaaaazy52vsqsd4i4eyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

*Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York 
Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader 
editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords 
apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be 
billed $5 for the first 12 weeks up front which is 
nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will 
automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will 
be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless 
canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and 
termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. 
Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other 
restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please 
add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book.

Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Join the influential audience of Times readers who stay up to the minute with timely news from the finest reporters, keeping you informed around the clock on your computer, smartphone or tablet. Follow the latest on fall films, fashion and football and never miss a beat with our breaking news coverage. And with a Times Digital Subscription, you no longer have to limit yourself to 10 articles a month.
